name: Haystacks
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 15 Minutes Bake Time: No Bake
1. Melt Butter Flavor Crisco, peanut butter, and butterscotch chips in a large saucepan over very low heat. Stir constantly until melted. Remove from heat.
2. Pour corn flakes into a large bowl. Pour the hot butterscotch mixture over the flakes. Stir with a large spoon until the flakes are coated. Stir in chocolate chips.
3. Spoon out the mixture (about 1/4 cup) into mounds on wax paper-lined baking sheet. Sprinkle with chopped nuts or jimmies, if desired.
4. Refrigerate until firm before serving.
Makes 3 dozen 2 1/2 cookies.
Chocolate jimmies are small chocolate pieces used for decoration.
